center.name: 马来群岛
center.summary: 马来群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括琵嘴鸭、金须拟䴕，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in large areas of Eurasia, western North America, and the Great Lakes region of the United States. This bird winters in western and southern Europe, the Indian subcontinent, the Caribbean, northern South America, the Malay Archipelago, Japan and other areas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The golden-whiskered barbet (Psilopogon chrysopogon) is an Asian barbet species native to the western Malay Archipelago, where it inhabits foremost forests up to elevation
